---
title: "Photo-double-ionization of ethylene and acetylene near threshold"
type: "article"
author: "B. Gaire, S. Y. Lee, D. J. Haxton, P. M. Pelz, I. Bocharova, F. P. Sturm, N. Gehrken, M. Honig, M. Pitzer, D. Metz, H. Kim, M. Schöffler, R. Dörner, H. Gassert, S. Zeller, J. Voigtsberger, W. Cao, M. Zohrabi, J. Williams, A. Gatton, D. Reedy, C. Nook, T. Müller, A. L. Landers, C. L. Cocke, I. Ben-Itzhak, T. Jahnke, A. Belkacem, T. Weber"
year: "2014"
publication: "Physical Review A 89"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1103/physreva.89.013403"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - journal article
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 50
fwci: 3.71
citation_percentile: 93.6
is_top_10_percent: true
is_oa: true
oa_status: bronze
counts_by_year:
  - [2019, 4]
  - [2020, 8]
  - [2021, 1]
  - [2022, 6]
  - [2023, 1]
  - [2024, 3]
  - [2025, 3]
  - [2026, 3]
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:15:23Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Photo-double-ionization of ethylene and acetylene near threshold
B. Gaire, S. Y. Lee, D. J. Haxton, P. M. Pelz, I. Bocharova, F. P. Sturm, N. Gehrken, M. Honig, M. Pitzer, D. Metz, H. Kim, M. Schöffler, R. Dörner, H. Gassert, S. Zeller, J. Voigtsberger, W. Cao, M. Zohrabi, J. Williams, A. Gatton, D. Reedy, C. Nook, T. Müller, A. L. Landers, C. L. Cocke, I. Ben-Itzhak, T. Jahnke, A. Belkacem, T. Weber
Physical Review A 89


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
